title: Crispy Irish Baby New Potatoes Stir-fry
description: A hearty and comforting brunch dish featuring crispy baby new potatoes combined with a tangy pickle relish for a herbal, crisp flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Pickled Relish (e.g. gherkins or sweet pickle)

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C). Rinse baby new potatoes and pat dry.
Cut baby new potatoes into small bite-sized pieces. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle olive oil over potatoes and sprinkle with pepper. Toss well to coat evenly.
Roast in preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy, shaking the pan halfway through cooking time.
While potatoes are roasting, mix pickled relish with a bit of water to thin it slightly if needed.
Once potatoes are done, pour the hot potato mixture over the top. Toss gently but ensure that potatoes get evenly coated with the pickle relish.
Serve immediately as a side dish or appetizer for brunch.
